projectDescription: An open-source SDK and runtime for building JavaScript applications on resource-constrained microcontrollers, featuring the XS JavaScript engine, networking, graphics, hardware I/O, and a full suite of build tools.
keyFeatures: XS JavaScript engine with >99% ES2025 conformance
Build and deploy JavaScript apps to microcontrollers with mcconfig
Networking: HTTP/HTTPS, WebSockets, MQTT, BLE, Wi-Fi, TLS
Commodetto bitmap graphics library and Poco scanline renderer
Piu object-based UI framework with animations and touch support
Hardware I/O: Digital GPIO, Analog, PWM, I2C, SPI, Servo, Audio
ECMA-419 (TC53) standard embedded JavaScript I/O APIs
Mods: secure, portable user-installed JavaScript extensions
xsbug: full source-level JavaScript debugger with memory profiling
Desktop simulator for macOS, Linux, and Windows
Support for ESP32, ESP8266, nRF52, Raspberry Pi Pico, Zephyr, and more
publicApiSurface: mcconfig — build, deploy, and run Moddable apps
mcrun — build and install Mods
xsbug — source-level JavaScript debugger
manifest.json — project build configuration
Timer, Time, UUID, Worker, Instrumentation (base modules)
Net, HTTP, WebSocket, MQTT, DNS, SNTP, WiFi (network module)
BLE Peripheral and Central APIs
SecureSocket / TLS certificate management
Commodetto bitmap classes and pixel format converters
Poco renderer: JS and C drawing APIs
Piu UI framework: Content, Container, Application, Style, Transition, Behavior
Digital, Analog, PWM, I2C, SMBus, Servo (pins module)
AudioOut (pins/audioout)
Flash, File, Preference, Resource, ZIP (files module)
Base64, Hex encode/decode (data module)
Digest, Cipher, HMAC, Random, Certificate (crypt module)
ECMA-419 IO classes: Digital, Analog, PWM, I2C, SPI, Serial, SMBus, Pulse Count, Wake
Mods API: install, update, remove user JavaScript extensions
XS Preload: freeze modules into ROM
XS in C: JS/C bridge API (xsGet, xsSet, xsCall, xsNewObject, etc.)
